{{Quote|A Selonian advocate from the Corellian Tribunal has been spying for the Rebels and aiding them with acts of terrorism throughout the Corellia System. She must be eliminated, and the Rebels must be blamed.|[[Lord/Legends|Lord]] [[Hethrir]], to an Imperial spacer|<ref name="SWG:TtR" />}}
'''Nomi''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Selonian/Legends|Selonian]] [[Lawyer/Legends|advocate]] from the [[Corellian Tribunal]] and supporter of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. She was killed in [[Nashal]] by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].
[[File:Nomi_corpse.jpg|thumb|left|220px|Nomi's corpse]]

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Nomi was a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:SAM" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Nomi's corpse was added to the game with the revamped "[[W:c:swg:Rebel Theme Park|Rebel Theme Park]],"<ref name="SWG:SAM" /> released with the "[[W:c:swg:Chapter 6 Notes for May 22 2007|Chapter 6]]" update, on [[May 22]], [[2007]].<ref name="SonyCite-Publish Notes – Chapter 6: Masters of the Wild">{{SonyCite|url=players/news_archive.vm?id=67250&month=052007|text=Publish Notes – Chapter 6: Masters of the Wild}}</ref> Nomi herself was later introduced with the revamped "[[W:c:swg:Imperial Theme Park|Imperial Theme Park]],"<ref name="SWG:TtR" /> released with the "[[W:c:swg:Update Notes 6.12: September 13 2007|Chapter 6.12]]" update, on [[September 13]], [[2007]].<ref name="SonyCite-Chapter 6.12: Masters of the Wild">{{SonyCite|url=players/news_archive.vm?id=67417&month=092007|text=Chapter 6.12: Masters of the Wild}}</ref>
